title: sambucus canadensis f. acutiloba
intro: Sambucus canadensis f. acutiloba, also known as American elderberry with a specific leaf shape, is a variant of the Sambucus canadensis plant, a flowering shrub native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds, particularly in its berries, leaves, and flowers. The health benefits of Sambucus canadensis f. acutiloba include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or syrups, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
